title: Dependency on PersistMemoryManager (pmm)
description: pjson depends on pmm as its sole external dependency for memory management, persistent pointers, and persistent data structures. The pmm version must be compatible with pjson's requirements.
rationale: pmm provides the foundational persistent address space management. All pjson data structures are built on top of pmm primitives.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: pjson compiles with the latest pmm release
No other external dependencies besides pmm and the C++ standard library
